title: Speizoc g-2000
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Speizoc g-2000s''' were extremely sensitive life sensors equipped aboard [[Carillion ship|Carillion]] ships, and produced by [[Speizoc Arms]].

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{Mo}}
